original_image_tags: Handwritten letter on aged, lined paper with punch holes at the top. Ink is primarily blue, with annotations in red ink. Several official FBI stamps are visible at the bottom, including "RECORDS - 9A", "INDEXED - 9A", and "EX-130". A large vertical red stamp reads "EXP COPY".

elements.description: No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts are visible. The page consists entirely of blue handwritten cursive text on lined paper, with various typed and handwritten stamps, annotations, and signatures at the bottom and margins.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains handwritten text and stamps at the bottom, but Description A specifies certain stamp text ('RECORDS - 9A', 'INDEXED - 9A', 'EX-130', 'EXP COPY') while Description B does not mention any specific stamp text, creating a detail omission without contradiction.
